docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-29-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-29-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF KYLE LLOYD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HARRY DONG IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,850.48 FILED BY LLOYD, KYLE AS TO DEFENDANT DONG, HARRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-29-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LLOYD, KYLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DONG, HARRY $2,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,835.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $85.00) SERVED MAR-19-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DONG, HARRY
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LLOYD, KYLE AS TO DEFENDANT DONG, HARRY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-29-2019 - JUDGMENT.
